scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others --names API,MOBILE,DASH --prefix-colors magenta,blue,green "npm run api" "npm run web" "npm run dashboard"
scripts.api: cross-env DONE_STT_ENABLED=true uv run --project apps/api uvicorn app.main:app --env-file .env --reload --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8001
scripts.api:phone: cross-env DONE_STT_ENABLED=true DONE_API_AUTH_ENABLED=true uv run --project apps/api uvicorn app.main:app --env-file .env --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8001
scripts.api:production: cross-env DONE_STT_ENABLED=true DONE_DEMO_FAILURES_ENABLED=false DONE_DEMO_ENDPOINTS_ENABLED=false DONE_COMMERCE_MODE=live uv run --project apps/api uvicorn app.main:app --env-file .env --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8001 --workers 1
scripts.lint:api: cd apps/api && uv run ruff check app tests
scripts.test: npm run typecheck && npm run test:mobile && npm run test:api
